items.title: MLS: Messi did not break policy in alleged video
items.summary: Major League Soccer is investigating allegations that Lionel Messi gained unauthorized access to the officials' locker room following the match between Inter Miami and LAFC on Saturday at the LA Memorial Coliseum.

items.title: Wolves disgusted by 'abhorrent' Arokodare abuse
items.summary: Wolves have reported "abhorrent and unlawful" racist abuse against striker Tolu Arokodare, who has become the latest Premier League player to be subjected to discriminatory social media attacks.

items.title: Arteta: 'Ashamed' Arsenal showed grit vs. Spurs
items.summary: Mikel Arteta said Arsenal "showed what we're made of" in Sunday's 4-1 win at Tottenham after feeling "ashamed" by their previous draw at Wolves.

items.title: Sterling makes 1st app in 9 months with Feyenoord
items.summary: Raheem Sterling made his first competitive appearance since May 2025 on Sunday when he came off the bench for Feyenoord in their Eredivisie match against Telstar.

items.title: Feyenoord doet bij debuut Sterling uitstekende zaken in strijd om plek twee
items.summary: Feyenoord heeft uitstekende zaken gedaan in de strijd om plek twee in de Eredivisie. Waar Ajax en NEC punten verspeelden, deden de Rotterdammers dat niet na een minimale zege op Telstar (2-1). Het hoogtepunt van de wedstrijd was het debuut van Raheem Sterling.

items.title: Wellenreuther vol verbazing: 'Zie spelers opeens dribbelen rond de eigen zestien'
items.summary: Feyenoord-aanvoerder Timon Wellenreuther heeft zich enorm verbaasd over het spel van zijn ploeg. De Duitse doelman zag zijn teamgenoten de raarste dingen doen in de slotfase tegen Telstar.

items.title: VI Live: Roma breekt de ban tegen Cremonese, ook Porto op voorsprong
items.summary: Zondag staan er liefst vijf Eredivisie-duels op het programma. De wedstrijd van Feyenoord volg je in een apart liveblog, voor de rest kun je in deze VI Live terecht, net als voor al het buitenlandse voetbal.

items.title: Speciaalrol Bos helpt Feyenoord langs Telstar
items.summary: Feyenoord heeft uitstekende zaken op de ranglijst gedaan, door een wisselvallige wedstrijd tegen Telstar te winnen (2-1). Tegen de ploeg van Anthony Correia levert alleen de eerste helft Rotterdams doelgevaar op. Analyse van de doorslaggevende speciaalrol voor Jordan Bos.

items.title: Arsenal pass derby test of nerve as title race looks set to go to wire
items.summary: Arsenal passed the north London derby test with flying colours as Premier League title race looks likely to go to the wire, says chief football writer Phil McNulty

items.title: VI Live: volg hier alle reacties van Feyenoord - Telstar
items.summary: Feyenoord sluit zondag het Eredivisie-weekend af met een thuiswedstrijd tegen Telstar. De twee ploegen staan om 20.00 uur tegenover elkaar. Doet Feyenoord goede zaken in de strijd om plek twee? Je volgt het in deze VI Live. In onze andere VI Live kun je voor het overige voetbal terecht.

items.title: Nev: Arsenal answered questions in Spurs win and withstood title race pressure
items.summary: Gary Neville says Arsenal have answered questions in their win at Tottenham, and withstood the pressure put on them by Manchester City in the Premier League title race.

items.title: Arsenal answer title pressure with resounding derby win at Tottenham
items.summary: Despite the growing pressure in the title race, Mikel Arteta's team responded with character to claim a victory over their local rivals and deliver a message to their critics.

items.title: Gyokeres has best game for Arsenal, so why was it so good?
items.summary: There are still a lot of questions about Arsenal, the title race and what is to come from them in the run-in this season. But one thing is absolutely certain: Viktor Gyokeres had his best game for the club against Tottenham.

items.title: Eze torments Spurs again as leaders Arsenal win north London derby
items.summary: Eberechi Eze torments Tottenham Hotspur again as Arsenal made a title statement of intent by restoring their lead at the top of the Premier League table to five points with victory in the north London derby.

items.title: Mac Allister scores added-time winner as Liverpool beat Forest
items.summary: Alexis Mac Allister scores a 97th-minute winner as Liverpool beat Nottingham Forest in a chaotic finish at the City Ground.

items.title: Jimenez scores twice as Fulham leapfrog Sunderland into top half of table
items.summary: Raul Jimenez scores twice as Fulham end a run of three consecutive defeats, with a 3-1 win over Sunderland at the Stadium of Light in the Premier League.

items.title: Guessand gives Palace much-needed win against 10-man Wolves
items.summary: Evann Guessand scores a late winner as Crystal Palace beat 10-man Wolves to claim their first home win since early November.

items.title: Spurs must shed 'bad habits' and 'become serious', says Tudor
items.summary: Igor Tudor has called on relegation-threatened Tottenham to shed their "bad habits" and become "serious" after they were thrashed 4-1 at home to Arsenal in his first game in charge.

items.title: O'Neill, Röhl remain defiant despite dropping points in title race
items.summary: Martin O’Neill and Dany Röhl remained defiant in their pursuit of the Scottish Premiership title, despite both Celtic and Rangers both dropping points on Sunday.

items.title: Eze and Gyökeres at the double to boost Arsenal title bid with Spurs rout
items.summary: Arsenal could feel the breath of Manchester City on their necks and the questions mounting; the anxiety all around them. The draw at Wolves on Wednesday had been a disaster and, with only two Premier League wins in seven, everybody seemed to want to say the same thing. Mikel Arteta and his players were cracking up in their pursuit of the title. Continue reading...
